MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Pro Term Judge. James Green, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Margaret Del Coto. Judoni Bolden, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Charles Tillman Ramsey and John Richard Weinstein, Esq. represented Defendant, Russell Quinn. The case did not settle. Trial date is confirmed.
